*Executive Read*
Analyzed 53 time entries across 5 resource IDs with primary focus on training, automation, and wasted effort. Maintenance was isolated at 0 entry(s). The ugliest signals are repetitive quarter-hour fragments, thin summary notes, and policy-shaped work that should not keep stealing technician attention by hand.
